staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Add data entity based on type.

options.description: Number of parallel threads to use when creating accounts.
Type of data. Allowed values: accounts/swisscom

staticCommands.name: clear
staticCommands.description: Clear word list for the given course.

options.description: Course to add the word list to.

staticCommands.name: delete
staticCommands.description: Add data entity based on type.

options.description: Type of data. Allowed values: accounts/swisscom

staticCommands.name: export
staticCommands.description: Export data to a specific file.

options.description: Whether to put leaf list into one line.
Whether to get all items that don't even appear in the file.
Type of data. Allowed values: goethe/words, goethe/lists

staticCommands.name: import
staticCommands.description: Import word list for the given course.

options.description: Course to add the word list to.
Whether to force fill empty fields or not. Useful to fix column order.

values.name: listsfile
values.description: Lists file containing lists of words.

options.description: Type of data. For supported types, type `datax help`.

staticCommands.name: sync
staticCommands.description: Sync data in a specific file.

options.description: Whether to put leaf list into one line.
Whether to get all items that don't even appear in the file.
Type of data. Allowed values: goethe/words, goethe/lists
